title: Smoky British Haddock Bake
description: A lowfat, festive British dish that layers smoky seasoning and savory umami, delivering juicy haddock in a simple oven bake.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180 °C (350 °F) and lightly oil a 9‑by‑13‑inch baking dish.
In a small bowl whisk together smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, dried thyme, lemon zest, salt, and black pepper.
Pat haddock fillets dry with paper towels, then season both sides with the spice blend.
In a separate bowl whisk together low‑sodium soy sauce, Dijon mustard, and low‑fat milk until smooth.
Place seasoned fillets in the prepared dish and pour the soy‑mustard mixture over them, ensuring even coverage.
Drizzle the teaspoon of olive oil over the fillets.
Cover the dish with foil and bake for 12–15 minutes, until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
Remove the foil, raise the oven temperature to 200 °C (400 °F), and bake for an additional 3 minutes to brown the top lightly.
Transfer to a serving platter, sprinkle chopped parsley, and serve immediately.
